articles.title: 3 flee after allegedly trying to climb iconic Boston weather beacon
articles.description:

summary: Three individuals attempted to climb the weather beacon on May 28, 2026.

articles.title: Trump’s DOJ sues Mass., Maine over denying undercover license plates for federal agents
articles.description:

summary: Trump's DOJ filed a lawsuit against Massachusetts and Maine regarding undercover license plates.
Massachusetts Attorney General Joy Campbell's office is reviewing the lawsuit and defending RMV policy.
The outcome may affect federal agents' operations in Boston and state compliance with federal requests.

articles.title: No one in Mass. has heard of the snack that Rhode Islanders and ‘Real Housewives’ are obsessed with
articles.description:

For Rhode Islanders, pizza chips are a culinary staple, but for millions of […]

summary: Rhode Island's pizza chips gained fame on 'The Real Housewives of Rhode Island'.

Boston residents remain unaware of this popular regional delicacy.
